changes: Replaced v1 single-file architecture with modular v2 design
Updated grid emission factors to CER 2024 actual data
Rebaselined utility rates to Q1 2026 (ATCO, BC Hydro, Hydro-Québec, Enbridge, etc.)
Replaced cost scaling formula with building-type lookup tables
Separated heating vs. DHW fraction in savings calculations
Added cold-climate ASHP penalty (20% cost adder for AB/SK)
Added postal code HDD lookup (412 postal prefixes, ~49 KB)
Implemented financing scenarios (cash vs. loan payback)
Added ranking logic decomposition (show why recommendation won)
Added confidence intervals on all estimates

dataUpdates.provinces.json: All 10 provinces; utility rates, grid factors, incentives updated to Q1 2026
dataUpdates.postal-codes.json: 412 postal code prefixes with HDD values from NRCAN
dataUpdates.interventions.json: 7 retrofits with updated costs, savings multipliers, cold-climate specs

sources: ATCO Gas, BC Hydro, Hydro-Québec, Enbridge tariff schedules (Jan 2026)
ECCC National Inventory Report emission factors

tasks: Check utility rates for Q2 2026 updates
Update incentive amounts (Canada Greener Homes, provincial programs)
Monitor coal phase-out progress (AB, SK, NS)

dataValidation.validationProcess: Manual review against official utility tariffs, CER data, NRCan sources
